modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer beeping and no video on monitor

full_description_text: My computer is beeping. The monitor is on but no picture. It say to check video cable. I don’t know what to do.
short_description: Computer beeping and no video on monitor
description: My computer is beeping. The monitor is on but no picture. It say to check video cable. I don’t know what to do.
